all_labels.name: automerge
all_labels.description: PRs with this label will be merged if all checks are green

all_labels.name: backport
all_labels.description: Mergify will try to backport this. (WIP / Testing the functionality)

all_labels.name: bug
all_labels.description: This is a bug in the code (and not a new feature)

all_labels.name: enhancement
all_labels.description: This tackles a new feature of the code (and not a bug)

all_labels.name: needs more work
all_labels.description: Someone has worked on this but more work is needed

all_labels.name: PR welcome 💞
all_labels.description: This issue has no PR that tries to implement it. Please create one!

all_labels.name: question
all_labels.description: An issue asking a question with not direct implementation need.
